Supporter Care Manager | Green Party Careers
Now Hiring

Supporter Care Manager

Lead the Supporter Care Team and oversee the experience people have when communicating with the Green Party, helping us grow towards even more victories in 2028.

💷
Salary
£46,031 – £47,797
⏰
Hours
35 per week
📍
Location
Remote · London
📋
Contract
Permanent
📅
Closing Date
18th Jun 2026

About This Role

Are you passionate about making a real impact and driving change? Do you want to be at the forefront of ensuring the Green Party is ready to win even more MPs in the next election? After our success in winning four MPs at the last election, we are now gearing up for 2028, aiming to secure even more victories.

Our membership and supporters are key to achieving this, and this role will oversee the experience people have when communicating with the party with their queries and support the wider National Engagement team with their planning and access.

As the Supporter Care Manager, you will oversee the moments when our community need questions answering – from members checking their subscriptions, officers needing help navigating the database experience, or supporters with questions about our policy. You will also manage the telephone fundraising team, managing their campaigns by working with the Retention Manager and Field team.

In this role, you will have the opportunity to build something truly special, working with people across the organisation to ensure the Green Party grows in line with its ambitions.

Full Job Description

For the best experience on mobile, view or download the full job description below.

📄 View Job Description (PDF)

Ready to Apply?

Join the National Engagement Team and lead our Supporter Care function as we build towards 2028.

Apply Now
Applications Close
11:00am · 18th June 2026
Interviews
Week commencing 29th June 2026

Manage Consent
To provide the best experiences, we use technologies like cookies to store and/or access device information. Consenting to these technologies will allow us to process data such as browsing behaviour or unique IDs on this site. Not consenting or withdrawing consent, may adversely affect certain features and functions.
Functional Always active
The technical storage or access is strictly necessary for the legitimate purpose of enabling the use of a specific service explicitly requested by the subscriber or user, or for the sole purpose of carrying out the transmission of a communication over an electronic communications network.
Preferences
The technical storage or access is necessary for the legitimate purpose of storing preferences that are not requested by the subscriber or user.
Statistics
The technical storage or access that is used exclusively for statistical purposes. The technical storage or access that is used exclusively for anonymous statistical purposes. Without a subpoena, voluntary compliance on the part of your Internet Service Provider, or additional records from a third party, information stored or retrieved for this purpose alone cannot usually be used to identify you.
Marketing
The technical storage or access is required to create user profiles to send advertising, or to track the user on a website or across several websites for similar marketing purposes.
